hooks.command: cmd="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND:-}"; case "$cmd" in *'git push'*' main'*|*'git push origin main'*) echo 'BLOCKED: push to main forbidden — use a feature branch' && exit 1 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac

f="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; case "$f" in content/zh/*|content/en/*|content/ja/*) echo "→ wisdom-check  writing-check  accessibility-check" ;; layouts/*|assets/css/*|tailwind*) echo "→ visual-check" ;; esac; exit 0
